bridge_pass_id: RXGD_PASS_INSTANCE_COMPACTION (11) — NEW id to be allocated in the RXGD_PASS_* enum in src/rurix-godot/src/lib.rs by the later S4 slice (enum currently ends at RXGD_PASS_FUSED_POST_CHAIN = 10; this S1-S3 slice touches no lib.rs and only records the planned value)
reserved_patches: 0030-0032 (PATCH_ALLOCATION.md section 2: 0030 gate+callsite / 0031 runtime binding / 0032 recording+real-pass opt-in); patch 0030 additionally blocked on the GRX-015 patches 0027-0029 landing first

grx015_dependency.declared_interface: visibility_mask = GRX-015 gpu_culling per-instance visibility bitmask, u32[ceil(N/32)], bit p = word p>>5 bit p&31, 1 = survives; tail bits beyond N-1 are don't-care (this pass bound-checks; GRX-015 need not zero-pad)
grx015_dependency.status_when_authored: GRX-015 had NOT landed its pass package (spike/godot-rurix/passes has no gpu_culling dir); the later S4 gate must re-verify this interface against the landed GRX-015 contract before any dispatch (mismatch = fail-closed fallback)
grx015_dependency.disabled_path_correctness: when GRX-016 is disabled (the default), GRX-015 must degrade to count-only (telemetry only, no buffer mutation, no visible_instances change), which keeps the native path trivially correct; GRX-016 without GRX-015 has no input and falls back
grx015_dependency.pr_boundary: per GRX_PLAN.md GRX-016 接续说明 the two milestones are never merged into one PR

godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the later patch 0030 call-site gate and the patch 0031 native-handle mapping. This S1-S3 slice delivers the OFFLINE face only (contract trio + three-variant offline kernel chain + zero-tolerance math parity); the hook/patch, bridge gate and dispatch smoke are later slices. Unlike GRX-009..014 there is NO native compute pass being replaced: the pass is ADDITIVE and plugs into the MultiMesh 'draw the first N instances' contract.

storage_class.stride: 3D transform-only stride_cache = 12 floats per instance (color_offset_cache = 12 for 3D, mesh_storage.cpp L1577-1580); GPU buffer = storage_buffer_create(instances * stride_cache * sizeof(float)) (L1596-1599)
storage_class.transform_layout: 12 floats = 3 rows of (basis.rows[i][0..2], origin[i]) = 3 float4 rows (mesh_storage.cpp L1900-1911)
storage_class.native_pass_shape: NONE — no native compaction kernel exists. The native visibility lever is the CPU-set visible_instances (mesh_storage.cpp L2187-2216); the renderer draws the FIRST N instances of the buffer (multimesh_get_instances_to_draw, mesh_storage.h L721-728). The compaction strategy exploits exactly this contract: survivors moved to the buffer front + survivor count = first-N draw of survivors only, no draw-shader gather indirection.

godot_hook_investigation.shader_note: no native Godot compaction shader; the math target is the CPU stable-stream-compaction reference in generate_math_parity_evidence.py (integer-exact / byte-exact, zero tolerance) and the b0 block is Rurix-defined (no native push constant to mirror)

call_sites.note: ginstance->instance_count = multimesh_get_instances_to_draw(...); the DEPENDENCY_CHANGED_MULTIMESH_VISIBLE_INSTANCES handler at L4783-4787 re-reads it when visible_instances changes. The GRX-016 runtime injection point (later patch 0030) is on the compute timeline after the GRX-015 culling dispatch, with survivor-count consumption candidates (a) CPU readback -> multimesh_set_visible_instances (one-frame latency, to be measured) or (b) the GPU-side indirect command-buffer count write (mesh_storage.cpp L2206-2213, GRX-018 territory); the design is deferred to the later serial patch slice.

source_resources: GRX-015 gpu_culling visibility bitmask (u32[ceil(N/32)]; a Rurix-pass output, not a Godot resource; declared interface, PASS_CONTRACT.md section 5.3)
multimesh->buffer (Godot MultiMesh SSBO, mesh_storage.cpp L1598; 12 floats = 3 float4 per instance in the in-scope 3D transform-only layout; never mutated by this pass)
godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: dst_transforms compacted staging buffer (Rurix-owned, 3 float4 per instance, sized for the full N worst case; survivors packed at the front in stable index order; tail untouched = don't-care under first-N draw) + survivor_count u32[1]

descriptor_mapping.root_constants: Rurix-defined 32-byte / 8-dword CompactionParams (total_instances, bitmask_words, num_groups, transform_stride_vec4, 4 pads), shared byte-identical by all three variants; NO native push constant exists to mirror (see resource_mapping.md and artifacts/instance_compaction_descriptor_layout.json)
descriptor_mapping.dispatch_chain_barriers: D1 scan_local -> UAV barrier (local_prefix + group_totals) -> D2 scan_groups -> UAV barrier (group_offsets + survivor_count) -> D3 scatter -> transition dst_transforms/survivor_count for consumption; all-or-nothing (no partial chain)
descriptor_mapping.requires_64bit_integer_shader_capability: instance_compaction carries no i64 push-constant fields (CompactionParams is all u32), so SHADER_INT64 is NOT part of its binding preflight (same as GRX-013/014; contrast with the GRX-009/010/011/012 texture passes)

supported_math_subset.variant: stable stream compaction of a 3D transform-only MultiMesh buffer (stride 12 floats = 3 float4), three-dispatch chain, GROUP_SIZE = 256
supported_math_subset.scan_local: thread p reads bit p of the GRX-015 mask (word p>>5, bit p&31, guarded by p < total_instances); groupshared Hillis-Steele inclusive scan (8 fixed steps, two GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync per step); local_prefix[p] = inclusive - own bit; group_totals[gid] = last lane's inclusive total
supported_math_subset.scan_groups: single 256-thread group scans group_totals into exclusive group_offsets and survivor_count[0] = grand total; requires num_groups <= 256 (N <= 65536)
supported_math_subset.scatter: surviving p moves its 3 x uint4 payload bit-preserving to rank = group_offsets[p/256] + local_prefix[p]; non-survivors write nothing (dst tail untouched, don't-care under first-N draw)
supported_math_subset.ordering_contract: STABLE (rank monotone in p: survivors keep relative index order) but absolute instance indices change; OPAQUE-ONLY — alpha-blended materials and absolute-instance-index-keyed consumers are out of scope (PASS_CONTRACT.md section 5.2)
supported_math_subset.determinism: no float arithmetic anywhere: u32 adds + bit-preserving moves; CPU reference matches with ZERO tolerance (element-wise integer equality for prefixes, whole-buffer byte equality for dst)
supported_math_subset.parameterization: all sizes come from the shared 8-dword b0 (total_instances / bitmask_words / num_groups / transform_stride_vec4); nothing is hardcoded except GROUP_SIZE = 256 (a kernel-structural constant baked into all three variants and the capacity bound)

known_gaps: 3D transform-only MultiMesh layout (stride 12 floats = 3 float4 per instance); colors/custom_data channels (stride 16/20) and the 2D layout (stride 8) unsupported
motion-vector double-buffer MultiMesh layout unsupported (current/previous halves would compact to different ranks)
opaque-only ordering contract: alpha-blended / transparent materials and absolute-instance-index-keyed consumers are out of scope (PASS_CONTRACT.md section 5.2)
capacity bound total_instances <= 65536 (single-level group hierarchy: num_groups <= 256); larger N needs a third scan level

depends on the GRX-015 gpu_culling visibility bitmask; GRX-015 had not landed its pass package when this slice was authored — the later S4 gate must re-verify the declared interface (PASS_CONTRACT.md section 5.3)
survivor-count consumption wiring (CPU readback multimesh_set_visible_instances vs GRX-018 indirect args) is a later-slice / owner decision
runtime hook / native-handle binding not wired (patches 0030-0032, later serial slices; patch 0030 additionally blocked on GRX-015 patches 0027-0029)
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real three-dispatch chain (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical instance_compaction package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact set (three DXC cs_6_0 containers validated by dxv, per-slot structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0 per variant). instance_compaction is an all raw-buffer / SSBO pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker does NOT apply; the workaround is used because of three rurixc blockers: (1) the DXIL compute-body lowering accepts only View<global, f32>/ViewMut<global, f32> buffer views (src/rurixc/src/dxil_codegen.rs L1754/L1786) while the bitmask/prefix/totals/offsets/count buffers are u32 words whose bit patterns an f32 view cannot carry bit-faithfully; (2) the integer bit ops the bitmask decode needs exist in MIR (BinOp::BitAnd/Shl/Shr, src/rurixc/src/mir.rs L643-647) but have no DXIL-backend lowering; (3) the lang subset HAS shared let (addrspace(3), M5.3/RXS-0079) and barrier() (DeviceIntrinsic::Barrier) but both lower ONLY on the NVPTX path — the DXIL compute-body lowering explicitly rejects shared let (src/rurixc/src/dxil_codegen.rs L921-924) and has no barrier lowering, so the groupshared prefix scan cannot be expressed

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The runtime path is fallback-only and NOTHING is wired: no bridge gate exists yet (S4), no RXGD_PASS_INSTANCE_COMPACTION id has been allocated in lib.rs, no Godot patch exists (0030-0032 reserved), and no dispatch has ever run. real_gpu_pass=false and real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false are the honest fail-closed values; this manifest never advances on offline evidence alone.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: NOT authored in this slice. The later S4 InstanceCompactionGate mirrors the GRX-014 ClusterStoreGate template extended to the three-variant chain: preflight (per-variant resource counts/orders, shared 32-byte b0, nonzero total_instances, bitmask_words == ceil(N/32), num_groups == ceil(N/256) <= 256, transform_stride_vec4 == 3, buffer sizes consistent; NO int64 cap check) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_INSTANCE_COMPACTION_REAL_PASS (1u << 10) opt-in + non-null handles + per-variant package layout/digest match vs the S2 offline evidence, all SEVEN canonical digests baked) -> per-slot binding-kind conformance -> math-parity gate (instance_compaction_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real three-dispatch chain with the PASS_CONTRACT section 5.1 barrier contract, all-or-nothing, only under a recording-shim feature (shipping feature-off fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked).
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: NOT authored in this slice. PATCH_ALLOCATION.md section 2 reserves 0030-0032 for instance_compaction (0030-rurix-accel-instance-compaction-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch / 0031 runtime binding / 0032 recording+real-pass opt-in); patch authoring is a later serial slice under the stack-lock, and 0030 is additionally blocked on the GRX-015 patches 0027-0029 landing first.

S5 patch 0030 (gate + call-site opt-in; blocked on GRX-015 patches 0027-0029) and S7 patches 0031/0032 — serial slices under the PATCH_ALLOCATION stack-lock

per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.offline_compile: offline_compile_evidence.json (measured): per-variant DXC cs_6_0 compile + DXV validation pass + Rurix-owned RTS0; SEVEN canonical artifacts (3 DXIL + 3 RTS0 + 1 descriptor JSON) with SHA-256 recomputable on disk
evidence_requirements.math_parity: math_parity_evidence.json: deterministic synthetic bitmask + transform fixtures with an integer-exact / byte-exact CPU reference (ZERO tolerance) covering sparse-multi-group / all-survive / zero-survive / garbage-tail-word / empty-leading-group cases (generator fails if any coverage counter is zero); status=pending_gpu_dispatch
evidence_requirements.standalone_dispatch: later slice (S6): real three-dispatch chain with UAV barriers, every measured word/byte compared exactly (zero tolerance) against the tracked CPU reference
evidence_requirements.visual: later enablement slice (S8); this slice claims none
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed; GRX_PLAN.md GRX-016 verification = visibility correctness first

disclaimer: GRX-016 instance_compaction is at the S1-S3 level only: the pass contract trio, the three-variant DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel chain (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, Rurix-owned RTS0 per variant), and the integer-exact / byte-exact CPU math-parity reference (zero tolerance). implemented=false, runtime_state=fallback_only, real_gpu_pass=false, real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=false are the honest fail-closed values: no bridge gate exists, no RXGD_PASS id is allocated, no Godot patch exists (0030-0032 reserved; 0030 blocked on GRX-015 patches 0027-0029), no GPU dispatch has ever run, the GRX-015 visibility-bitmask interface is a declared dependency pending re-verification when GRX-015 lands, the pass is opaque-only by its ordering contract, and NO visual-superiority, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
